description: Letter from Ismaʿīl b. Faraḥ (Alexandria) to Nahray b. Nissim (Fustat), 9 September 1056. Confirms the arrival of goods and letters and sends information about the arrival of ships from Palermo and about some terrifying events in the Maghreb, especially in Susa (see details in Goitein’s notes). Includes orders for goods that are expected in Alexandria, where many foreign traders are present, as well as details of money transfers. (Information mainly from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, p. 628.)
tags: Alexandria, susa, Sicily, movement of ships, Nahray B. Nissim
description_he: מכתב מישמעאל בן פרח, מאלכסנדריה, לנהראי בן ניסים, 9 בספטמבר 1056, על אוניות, מטענים ואירועים במגרב
